name: Anika Sharma
title: Main character energy for real
review: I ordered the navy co-ord after stalking @labelishnya for weeks and it was everything. The drape sits so beautifully and I still felt comfortable all day at a wedding brunch. This is the desi fusion fit I have been looking for — stylish without trying too hard. Already planning my next order.

name: Rhea Kapoor
title: Perfect Bandra-to-brunch look
review: Found Ishnya on Instagram and ordered two sets in one go. The print quality is gorgeous and the fit is so flattering. Wore the red kurta set to Linking Road and got so many compliments. Soft fabric, easy to move in, and it photographs insanely well. Shipping was quick too.

name: Meera Pillai
title: Festive but still wearable
review: Ordered a co-ord and an embroidered kurta for a family function. Both pieces felt premium and the colours are so rich in person. Only wish I had sized up once, but exchange was easy. The occasion-wear vibe with everyday comfort is exactly what Ishnya promises.

name: Divya Nair
title: Finally found my fusion brand
review: I am so done with outfits that look ethnic but feel stiff. Ishnya hits that Pret · Fusion · Occasion sweet spot. The shirt co-ord I bought is breathable, polished, and makes me feel put together from morning meetings to dinner. Packaging was cute and thoughtful too.

name: Sanya Khanna
title: Looks expensive, feels soft
review: The embroidery on my kurta is so pretty and the pants fit perfectly. I wore it to a daytime celebration and danced in it for hours — no itch, no cling. Female friends keep asking where I got it. Telling everyone it is @labelishnya.

name: Ishita Roy
title: My go-to Indo-Western label
review: Every piece I have bought from Ishnya feels current and comfortable. Desi fusion done right.

name: Tanvi Mehta
title: Travel-friendly co-ord
review: Packed the drape skirt set for a weekend trip and it did not wrinkle much. Looked put together at every dinner.

name: Preethi Subramanian
title: True to the Instagram posts
review: Exactly like the reels — colours pop, fit is flattering, and it feels like main character energy in real life.

name: Zara Qureshi
title: Second order already
review: Bought one set, loved it so much I ordered another print the same week. Ishnya has me hooked.

name: Nidhi Gupta
title: Comfortable festive wear
review: Finally festive clothes I can actually sit and move in. Soft fabric and beautiful finishing.

name: Aarohi Jain
title: Obsessed with the prints
review: The lotus print co-ord is stunning. Soft, breezy, and so photogenic.

name: Kritika Bose
title: Inclusive sizing win
review: Ordered for myself and my sister — both of us found a great fit. That rarely happens.

name: Puja Ahluwalia
title: Wedding guest approved
review: Wore Ishnya to a daytime wedding and felt elegant without being overdressed. Perfect fusion vibe.

name: Kavya Reddy
title: Desi fusion done right
review: Modern, comfortable, and so chic. Exactly what I want from occasion wear.

name: Simran Batra
title: My everyday ethnic upgrade
review: Reaching for these co-ords every week now. That says everything.
